fallbackSourcesUsed: Yahoo Finance chart API public/unofficial endpoint
missing_evidence: Per-holding source confidence fields are missing for current holdings despite fresh price tape.
Forward valuation / FCF yield / next catalyst fields are incomplete for several holdings.
No verified brokerage cost basis or user-provided allocation constraints; concentration/risk budget remains approximate.
Community/YouTube alternative-source hypotheses were not promoted because no validated claim changed action posture.
Comprehensive fresh web/current-news sweep is missing because web_search preflight failed; only official/web_fetch/local adapter evidence was used.
Post-holiday regular-session U.S. equity tape confirmation after markets reopen.
stale_data: U.S. equity and holding tape is prior-session/after-hours around the May 25, 2026 holiday window; do not treat as fresh regular-session Monday tape.
unsupported_claims: Any buy/add conclusion from opportunity-asymmetry alone is unsupported and remains blocked.
Any ticker promotion without primary evidence, price zone, invalidation, and risk budget is unsupported.
Any claim of comprehensive freshness/current research is unsupported in this cycle.
Any market-regime change inferred from missing regular-session May 25 equity movement is unsupported during the holiday/after-hours window.
failed_sources: web_search/DuckDuckGo preflight failed with bot-detection challenge; not retried per protocol.
degraded_states: portfolio-translation: fresh tape but missing confidence/valuation fields
blocked holding confidence sources: MSFT, AMZN, CEG, META, TSLT, CONL, SPY, MA, BMNR, TSNF, NFLX
market-landscape: observation only; no posture promotion from fetch-only evidence
render_permission_reason: Render only degraded honesty/observation state; deployment is blocked by failed web_search/current-news coverage, prior-session holding tape around the holiday window, and missing holding confidence/valuation/risk-budget fields.
